articles.title: A Look At WH Group (SEHK:288) Valuation After The Q1 2026 Earnings Call
articles.summary: WH Group (SEHK:288) held its Q1 2026 earnings call on 28 April. This was a key update for anyone tracking how this global pork and packaged meats producer is running its China, North America, and Europe operations. See our latest analysis for WH Group. At a share price of HK$9.8, WH Group has had a mixed short term run, with a 7 day share price return of 2.94% and a 30 day share price return of 6.22%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 61.57% and 3 year total shareholder return above 200%...

articles.title: Smithfield Near Breakout As Iran War Drives Food, Plastics Prices
articles.summary: Packaged food company Smithfield Foods, which specializes in pork products, broke out Wednesday after an earnings report that trounced expectations. Smithfield Foods makes a slew of processed meat products such as lunch meats, bacon, sausages and precooked barbecue. Smithfield Foods topped analyst expectations across the board.

articles.title: Smithfield Foods to replace South Dakota plant
articles.summary: Smithfield Foods, owned by China's WH Group, has estimated the investment at $1.3bn over three years.

articles.title: Smithfield Foods to close US production plant
articles.summary: Some 190 employees are affected by the closure. The lay-offs will take place between April and September.

articles.title: 3 Asian Dividend Stocks With Up To 5.4% Yield
articles.summary: As Asian markets navigate a landscape of mixed economic signals and geopolitical uncertainties, investors are increasingly turning their attention to dividend stocks as a potential source of steady income. In this context, identifying dividend stocks with attractive yields can offer a measure of stability and income generation in an otherwise volatile environment.
